problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: Attention mechanism with linear complexity may resolve How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
